claims.text: I claim: 1. A process for preventing or treating panic attacks comprising the administration to a human subject susceptible to panic attacks, in unit dosage form, from about 0.01 mg to about 0.4 mg/kg...

indications.text:
Anxiety Disorders
XANAX Tablets (alprazolam) are indicated for the management of anxiety disorder (a
condition corresponding most closely to the APA Diagnostic and Statistical Manual [DSM­
III-R] diagnosis of generalized anxiety disorder) or the short-term relief of symptoms of
anxiety. Anxiety or t...

XANAX is indicated for the:
 acute treatment of generalized anxiety disorder (GAD) in adults.
 treatment of panic disorder (PD), with or without agoraphobia in adults.
